Options:
(A) 06/17/2017
(B) 07/16/2017
(C) 06/18/2017
(D) 06/18/2016
(E) 06/18/2054
(F) 12/18/2016
model_response:
Jane bought 40 eggs on May 9th, 2017, and ate one egg per day. If she ate the first egg on the day of purchase, she would run out of eggs after 40 days of eating. Since she ate on May 9th, the 40th egg is eaten on May 9th plus 39 days, which is June 17th, 2017. This matches option (A).

Final Answer: (A)
